incorrect_answers: Start from party system and skip checking constraints.
Use Political Parties framework as a shortcut and avoid interpretation.
Pick Political Parties application by intuition and finalise without verification.

results.name: Social Studies

results.question: Assertion-Reason in "Political Parties": Assertion: Political Parties is useful. Reason: It must still be validated. Pick the correct option.
